from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Dict, List, Set


@dataclass
class ExperimentConfig:
    name: str
    hyperparameters: Dict[str, float] = field(
        default_factory=lambda: {"learning_rate": 0.01, "batch_size": 32}
    )
    feature_columns: List[str] = field(
        default_factory=lambda: ["user_id", "timestamp"]
    )
    excluded_models: Set[str] = field(default_factory=set)
    augmentation_pipeline: List[str] = field(
        default_factory=lambda: ["flip", "rotate"]
    )
